summary_one_line_zh: AI 从“功能”转向“记忆、流程与风险边界”的系统化落地。
summary_one_line_en: AI shifts toward memory, workflows, and risk boundaries.

items.why_zh: 记忆从会话附属变成产品层能力，影响个性化、上下文控制和隐私隔离设计。
items.why_en: Memory becomes a product primitive, changing personalization, context control, and privacy boundaries.
items.so_what_zh: 检查你产品的长期记忆策略：分层存储、可删改、可解释三件事补齐。
items.so_what_en: Audit long-term memory: tiering, editability, and deletion.

items.title_zh: 软件交付改为 Agent 流程
items.why_zh: 这是从“用 AI 辅助开发”走向“让代理接管流程”的组织级信号，直接影响 CI/CD、权限和评审边界。
items.why_en: Signals a shift from AI-assisted dev to agent-run workflows, affecting CI/CD, permissions, and review boundaries.
items.so_what_zh: 把一条内部流水线改成 agent 先跑：从工单分流或测试归因开始。
items.so_what_en: Pilot one pipeline with an agent first: triage tickets or test attribution.

items.title_zh: AI 生物防御行动计划
items.why_zh: AI 风险开始进入可执行治理层，意味着模型能力、滥用监测和组织安全要联动设计。
items.why_en: AI risk is moving into operational governance, linking model capability, abuse monitoring, and org security.
items.so_what_zh: 复查高风险能力的发布门禁：红队、滥用检测、审计日志三项并行。
items.so_what_en: Recheck release gates for risky capabilities: red-team, abuse detection, audit logs.
